name: Ground Beef Summer Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and form into 2 rolls, each measuring 2 inches in diameter (makes 4 rolls).
2. Seal the rolls in aluminum foil and refrigerate for 24 hours.
3. Remove from refrigerator and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes in a foil broiler pan at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Open the foil carefully and allow the sausages to drain.
5. When cooled, wrap each sausage tightly in plastic wrap and store in the refrigerator.
